properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v3 v5 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You are God, and we lift You up We keep singing, We keep praising We wont stop, Giving all we got Cause Your worthy, Of all glory

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh, There is no other, You are forever Lord over all There's nobody like You, No one beside You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: To You let endless praise resound Every night and day, and with no delay Let endless praise resound

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Boundless Love, light before the sun Your glory, eternal Never stops, giving all you got Creation, keeps singing

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: We lift You up up up We are giving You our love love love For everything You've done done done We give you all the praise
